subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Thy letter hath reached Our presence and We have perused that wherewith thou didst call upon God, thy Lord, the Mighty, the Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسن قد حضر کتابک بین یدینا و قرئنا ما نادیت به الله ربک المقتدر العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @firmness in the Covenant
